chapter_title.ar: بَابُ حُبِّ الدُّنْيَا وَ الْحِرْصِ عَلَيْهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 126 – Love of the world and the greed upon it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/232)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/232)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) إِنَّ الدِّينَارَ وَ الدِّرْهَمَ أَهْلَكَا مَنْ كَانَ قَبْلَكُمْ وَ هُمَا مُهْلِكَاكُمْ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Yaqoub Bin Zayd, from Ziyad Al Qindy, from Abu Wakie, from Abu Is’haq Al Sabie, from Al Haris Al Awr,

(It has been narrated) from Amir Al-Momineenasws having said: ‘Rasool-Allahsaww said: ‘The Dinar and the Dirham both destroyed the ones who were before you, and they will both destroy you all (as well)’.
en.sarwar: 6. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from Ya’qub ibn Yazid from Ziyad al-Qandi from abu Waki’ from ibn Ishaq al-Sabi’i from al-Harith al-A’War from Amir al-Mu’minin, Ali ibn abu Talib (a.s.) who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah has said, ‘The world and dirham (money) have destroyed those who lived before you and they will destroy you also.’”
